notes: - Image Viewer particle options improved & fixed Bubbles ZeroDivision crash
- Restored 'Autoplay on startup' option in Settings > General
• Added Shuffle Tracks + Album (5 shuffle modes total) & Repeat All (4 repeat modes total)
• Repeat modes now modify shuffle behavior & update Shuffle tooltips accordingly
• Super Shuffle + Repeat Off indexing fixed - no more repeats & stops at queue end
• Basic shuffle plays entire shuffle tracklist before proceeding to next album
• Volume popup background always contrasts foreground in every theme
• Playlist selection and item dragging improved
